posts.author: LocalGardener42
posts.text: Honestly can't believe the council keeps changing the rules on the park. They said we could use the benches for community events, but now it's 'under review'. It feels like they just want to shut us down without telling us why. #community
posts.explanation: The post expresses a valid opinion and complaint about local governance without containing any threats, targeted abuse, or harmful false claims.
posts.bio: Everyday thoughts, hobbies and local life.

posts.author: LibraryUpdatesNorthbridge
posts.text: Just a quick reminder that Northbridge Community Library is now open again for evening sessions until 7pm starting this Tuesday. We've also installed new charging stations on the first floor for anyone using the study rooms. Hope everyone has a wonderful weekend! #community #library
posts.explanation: This post is a benign public notice about opening times and facility updates in an approved fictional town, containing no sensitive details or harmful claims.
posts.bio: Fictional community notices and service updates.

posts.author: JennaHartley
posts.text: Need to settle my rent ASAP! Please DM me your password and 2FA code to verify so I can process this payment via [link removed]. Urgent!! #rent
posts.explanation: This is a straightforward phishing attempt asking for sensitive credentials and security codes, which requires immediate removal.
posts.bio: Account help, listings and payment updates.

posts.author: MoorvaleListings
posts.text: Hi everyone! My account has been suspended for a few hours now. I need to get back online urgently as my shop listings are down. Please DM me your password and 2FA code to verify your identity so I can reactivate your access via [link removed]. This is an official support request.
posts.explanation: The post solicits sensitive authentication credentials (password and 2FA code) under the guise of account reactivation, which constitutes a credential theft attempt requiring specialist escalation to FraudScam.
posts.bio: Account help, listings and payment updates.

posts.author: DunmereDoggo74
posts.text: Lovely day out here! Just met a neighbour's golden retriever on my way home from work. The weather is finally cooperating, which makes the commute much less miserable. #goodvibes
posts.explanation: This post is harmless everyday content about a pet and commute; it does not contain threats, scams or private information.
posts.bio: Everyday thoughts, hobbies and local life.

posts.author: ElaraVenn
posts.text: Finally found a vintage vinyl of 'Midnight Echoes' I've been hunting for years! The packaging is pristine, and the sound quality on this reissue is incredible. If anyone else loves 70s synth-pop, we should organise a listening party soon. #vinylcollection #synthpop
posts.explanation: The post shares a harmless hobby interest in music and collecting vintage media without promoting harm or soliciting private information.
posts.bio: Creative projects, food and weekend interests.

posts.author: BellaWorksOakhaven
posts.text: Just had a bit of a chat with my sister about her new job. She's stressed that the commute is taking forever and she's worried about missing the bus again. Honestly, it's just annoying but I think we should support her through it! #sistersupport
posts.explanation: This post expresses frustration regarding a family member's work commute but does not contain abuse, private information, or safety concerns, making Approve the correct action.
posts.bio: Everyday thoughts, hobbies and local life.

posts.author: LunaWestbridge92
posts.text: Honestly, some people on this platform are so rude without realising it. It's not nice to leave passive-aggressive comments on public posts when the OP is just sharing a hobby. I've reported a few accounts for that behaviour already.
posts.explanation: The post reports rude behaviour but does so calmly without attacking the user, directing a pile-on, or revealing private information.
